title: Find My Device - Device list with more then 4 devices
scenario: Find My Device list becomes scrollable with fade indicator when more than 4 headsets are paired
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Pair more than 4 Poly Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., headsets) to the Android device. Ensure some are connected and some are disconnected.
Tap on the Find My Device feature or section on the Home screen.
Observe the list of paired devices.
Attempt to scroll the list vertically.
expected: The Find My Device list expands to show all paired devices (more than 4). The list is scrollable, and a slight fade effect appears at the bottom of the list to indicate that more items are available to scroll to.
